description: Genewell Global Rule Engine — Declarative Configuration

calorie_logic.condition: goal includes 'gain-weight' OR goal includes 'gain_weight' OR goal includes 'muscle'
calorie_logic.note: Calorie target = TDEE + 200–300 kcal. Focus: lean muscle gain, NOT fat restriction.
calorie_logic.bannerText: GOAL CORRECTION: Your quiz states 'gain-weight'. All calorie guidance below is a SURPLUS above TDEE — not a deficit.

calorie_logic.condition: goal includes 'fat-loss' OR goal includes 'weight-loss' OR goal includes 'lose'
calorie_logic.note: 400–500 kcal deficit = 0.4–0.5 kg fat loss per week — optimal muscle-preserving rate.
100–200 kcal above TDEE supports gradual recomposition.

recommendations: Lock Your Wake-Sleep Schedule — extend bedtime backward, not forward
Cut ALL caffeine after 12 PM (not 2 PM)
sleep_rules.bannerText: SLEEP CRITICAL: Sleep deprivation at 3–5 hrs triggers high cortisol, thyroid suppression, and metabolic slowdown cascade.

recommendations: Target 7–8 hours with consistent wake time

snacks.examples: Boiled eggs (2) + roasted makhana OR peanut chaat + oat milk smoothie
Sweet potato chaat + Brazil nut (1) OR sprout chaat + coconut yogurt

meal_frequency_rules.bannerText: MEAL FREQUENCY: You eat {mealFrequency} meals/day. At your calorie target of {calorieTarget} kcal, this is physically very difficult without snacks.

hydration_rules.note: Hydration affects thyroid function, cortisol levels, and skin health.

lab_tests: TSH + Free T3 + Free T4 (BEFORE starting any supplements)
supplement_warnings: WARNING: Ashwagandha modulates thyroid — check with doctor before use
WARNING: Iodine supplements can worsen Hashimoto's — test first
SAFE: Zinc 25mg with food supports thyroid hormone synthesis
food_avoid: Excessive raw cruciferous vegetables (kale, broccoli, cauliflower) — steam them instead
thyroid_rules.bannerText: THYROID DETECTED: Sleep deprivation suppresses TSH. Get baseline bloodwork BEFORE Week 1 supplements.

dietary_restriction_rules.bannerText: GLUTEN-FREE ACTIVE: All wheat, roti, bread, maida, and semolina replaced throughout this report.

replace_with.milk: oat milk / soy milk / almond milk

dietary_restriction_rules.bannerText: LACTOSE INTOLERANCE ACTIVE: All meal suggestions in this report are dairy-free. Paneer, regular curd, milk, and Greek yogurt replaced with lactose-free alternatives.

shift_work_rules.condition: workSchedule includes 'shift' OR workSchedule includes 'night' OR workSchedule includes 'rotating'
protocol: Anchor: always sleep 7–8 hours IMMEDIATELY after shift ends, regardless of time
Light therapy: 20 min bright light (10,000 lux) at shift START
Keep sleep room completely dark (blackout curtains mandatory)
Maintain same 'pre-sleep routine' regardless of time of day
Eat main meal at shift START — avoid heavy meals in last 2 hours of shift
shift_work_rules.bannerText: SHIFT WORK PROTOCOL: Standard sleep timing advice does not apply to you. Follow the shift-specific circadian anchoring protocol.

addon_gender_mismatch_rules.condition: gender=male AND addon includes 'women_hormone' OR addon includes 'women_hormonal'
addon_gender_mismatch_rules.message: Women's Hormonal Health add-on is not applicable for male profiles.

addon_gender_mismatch_rules.condition: gender=female AND addon includes 'men_fitness' OR addon includes 'men_performance'
addon_gender_mismatch_rules.message: Men's Performance Pack add-on is not applicable for female profiles.
